default_strategy: Start with the smallest focused pytest selection that exercises the changed behavior.
Run the adjacent public test module before broadening across Click surfaces.
Prefer CliRunner-based assertions for command behavior; inspect Result fields instead of relying only on process exit.
When changing core option semantics, include tests that distinguish command-line input, envvar input, default_map, declared defaults, and prompts when relevant.
Avoid running hidden verifier paths, target commits, reference patches, or task-private artifacts in the ACUT run workspace.

interpretation.local_tests: ACUT-run local tests are auxiliary only; primary scoring comes from the fresh verifier workspace.
interpretation.failing_unrelated_tests: Record the narrowed failing surface and avoid broad unrelated refactors unless needed for the requested behavior.
interpretation.no_best_of_n: One primary attempt per ACUT/task; do not rely on retries to improve W2 scores.
